top_findings.summary: The skill description states it's for "Logging API requests" but the actual instructions require building complete production APIs from scratch (designing architecture, implementing endpoints, adding rate limiting, configuring databases, generating documentation and testing suites). This is excessive scope for a logging/tracking tool - it requests access to modify core application structure and infrastructure far beyond what's needed for audit logging. The skill appears to be a full API development framework disguised as a logging utility.
